headline: Is Ford (F) Using Lifestyle Partnerships Like Bronco Filson to Quietly Reposition Its Brand?
summary: Earlier this month, Ford and outdoor brand Filson introduced the first-ever Bronco Filson, a premium off-road 4x4 SUV built at Ford’s Michigan Assembly Plant, with orders opening in fall 2026 and US$ mid 70,000s targeted starting pricing. The Bronco Filson pairs Ford’s Sasquatch off-road hardware and 3.0-liter EcoBoost V6 with Filson-inspired materials and removable utility bags, underscoring Ford’s push to blend high-content lifestyle vehicles with premium margins and brand...

headline: Ford aluminum supplier Novelis restarts Oswego mill after 2025 fires
summary: Novelis, Ford's main aluminum supplier, was idled after two fires destroyed its hot mill last fall. On June 10, it said it has restarted the mill.

headline: General Motors follows Ford's lead into the battery business
summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian joins Julie Hyman on Market Catalysts to discuss General Motors' (GM) partnership with Peak Energy, placing a big bet on sodium-ion batteries. This comes one month after Ford (F) launched Ford Energy to develop energy storage batteries.

headline: CARFAX: Top 10 Vehicles Targeted by Recent Catalytic Converters Thefts
summary: New CARFAX data estimates more than 137,000 catalytic converters were stolen in 2025, with thousands more estimated stolen at the start of this year. Law enforcement warns thieves target these emission-control devices to get at the valuable precious metals they contain, including platinum, palladium and rhodium.

headline: Is It Time To Reassess Ford (F) After Its 48% One Year Share Price Jump?
summary: If you are wondering whether Ford Motor at US$14.95 is still offering value after a strong run, the next sections break down what the current price may be implying. The stock has slipped 7.4% over the past week, but is up 21.3% over 30 days, 12.1% year to date, and 48.0% over the last year. These moves can change how the market is weighing both upside and risk. Recent coverage has focused on how investors are reassessing traditional automakers as they balance legacy businesses with newer...
